GB 19044一2022

Minimum allowable values of energy

efficiency and energy efficiency grades

of fluorescent lamps for general

lighting

1 Scope

This document specifies the energy efficiency grades,minimum allowable values of energy efficien-

cy,and test methods of fluorescent lamps for general lighting.

This document is applicable to fluorescent lamps classified as types listed below :

一Self-ballasted fluorescent lamps with rated wattage of 3 W - 60 W (inclusive) and self-ballasted
fluorescent induction lamps with rated wattage of 10 W -60 W (inclusive) ,which integrate con-
trol gear and all additional elements necessary for starting and stable operation of the light source，
with Edison or bayonet cap,with rated voltage of AC 220 V,rated frequency of 50 Hz;

一Lamps having preheated cathodes,designed for operation on AC main frequencies with the use of a
starter,and additionally operating on high frequency, and lamps having preheated cathodes, de-
signed for operating on high frequency (hereafter referred as double-capped fluorescent lamps) ;

一Single-capped fluorescent lamps having preheated cathodes;

一Single-capped fluorescent induction lamps with rated wattage of 30 W- 400 W (inclusive).

This document is not applicable to self-ballasted fluorescent lamps with shades.

2 Normative references

The contents in the following documents constitute the essential clauses of this document through

normative references in the text. For dated references, only the edition cited applies. For undated

references ,the latest edition of the referenced document (including any amendments) applies.

GB/T 10682, Double-capped fluorescent lamps一Performance specifications

1
